## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (gofmt, vet, golangci-lint, govulncheck, test -race)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] All commits are signed off for the DCO (`git commit -s` — see [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
